notLoaded.title: Your screen is empty!
notLoaded.description: Load some files from your computer or run a quick scan to start naming them nicely!

emptyDatabase.title: All clean and tidy!
emptyDatabase.description: Scan a folder first, and anything we need to match or check will pop up right here!

scan.label: Looking for files
scan.description: We are reading your files and figuring out what they are.

rename.label: Renaming files
rename.description: Putting everything in the right place with the new names.

loadAll.label: Loading files
loadAll.description: Getting everything ready from the database. Hang tight!

dropzone.label: Drop files or folders here
dropzone.description: Drag and drop your media files right here to scan them.

toasts.scanComplete: All done! Found {count} files ready for new names.
toasts.renameComplete: All done! Your files are renamed and organized.
toasts.renameAborted: Renaming stopped. {count} files were renamed, and the rest were left alone.
toasts.noMatchedItems: No matched items to rename yet!
toasts.matchSearchFailed: We couldn't search the database. Let's try again!
toasts.matchResolveFailed: Oops! We couldn't update the match. Try again?
toasts.previewFailed: Oops! We couldn't open the preview.
toasts.noMediaPlayerConfigured: No media player configured. Please set the VLC or MPC-HC path in Settings.
toasts.abortTaskFailed: Oops! We couldn't stop the active process.
toasts.showInFolderFailed: Oops! We couldn't open that folder.
toasts.inspectLoadFailed: Oops! We couldn't load the inspection data.
toasts.inspectCopyFailed: Oops! We couldn't copy the JSON.
toasts.refreshRulesFailed: Oops! We couldn't refresh the organizer rules.
toasts.bulkOverrideSeasonRequired: Season number is required when converting items to episodes.
toasts.bulkOverrideAutoNumberRequired: Auto-numbering is required when converting items to episodes.
toasts.bulkOverrideStartEpisodeInvalid: Starting episode number must be a valid number.
toasts.overrideSeasonEpisodeRequired: Season and Episode numbers are required for episodes.
toasts.bulkOverrideSaveFailed: Oops! We couldn't save the bulk overrides.
toasts.selfParentError: An item cannot be its own parent.

renameModal.title: Confirm Rename
renameModal.description: Double-check the files before we rename them.

overrideModal.title: Change settings for this {type}
overrideModal.description: Pick different options or names for this item.
overrideModal.descriptionBulk: Apply settings or numberings to all selected items.

hints.mainType: Change whether this file is a Movie, an Episode, or an Extra/Bonus video.
hints.parentId: Pick the main movie or episode that this extra file belongs to.
hints.subcategory: Choose what kind of extra this is (like a trailer, poster, or deleted scene).
hints.language: Choose the language for this subtitle or audio file.
hints.targetLanguage: Choose the main language for this movie or episode.
hints.source: Choose where this video comes from (like Blu-Ray or DVD) to help name it.
hints.edition: Choose if this is a special version (like Director's Cut or Extended).
hints.audioType: Choose the audio style (like Stereo or Surround) to help format the name.
hints.seasonNum: Enter the season number for this episode.
hints.episodeNum: Enter the episode numbers. Use '3' for single, '3,4' for multiple, or '3-5' to automatically expand ranges.

labels.dragAndDropHint: Drag and drop the items below to arrange them in sequential order (top to bottom).

matchAction.title: Match Action
matchAction.description: Choose what to do with the current tv match since season or episode changed:
matchAction.resetDesc: Remove match and return to Review Needed.

targetNotes.delete: Will be deleted by extras rule

table.emptySearch: No items match your search in {context}.

details.title: Details
details.empty: Select an item from the list to see more details here!

delete.title: What should we do with this file?
delete.descriptionMedia: Choose what you'd like to do with this file. Any linked extras will follow along automatically where it makes sense.
delete.descriptionExtra: Choose what you'd like to do with this extra file.

ignore.label: Hide It
ignore.description: Hide it from the organizer for now. We will remember where it was so you can bring it back later.

dbOnly.label: Forget It Here
dbOnly.descriptionMedia: Only remove it from SWAYA. Your files will stay exactly where they are on your disk, and you can always scan them again later.
dbOnly.descriptionExtra: Only remove this extra from SWAYA. The file stays exactly where it is on your disk, and you can scan it again later.

trash.label: Move to Trash
trash.descriptionMedia: Send the file to the trash and remove it from SWAYA. All linked extras will go with it.
trash.descriptionExtra: Send this extra file to the trash and remove it from SWAYA.

bulkDelete.title: What should we do with the selected files?
bulkDelete.description: {count} selected items are ready for the same action.

dbOnly.descriptionMedia: Remove the selected items from SWAYA only. The files stay where they are, and you can scan them again later.
dbOnly.descriptionExtra: Remove the selected extras from SWAYA only. The files stay where they are, and you can scan them again later.
dbOnly.descriptionMixed: Remove the selected media and extras from SWAYA only. The files stay where they are, and you can scan them again later.

trash.descriptionMedia: Send the selected media files to the trash and remove them from SWAYA. Linked extras will go with them too.
trash.descriptionExtra: Send the selected extra files to the trash and remove them from SWAYA.
trash.descriptionMixed: Send the selected media and extra files to the trash and remove them from SWAYA.

inspect.title: Inspection Data
inspect.description: Combined organizer data, extracted info, and matched metadata for the selected item.

matchModal.title: Find the right match
matchModal.description: Search and apply a different movie or tv match for this item.
matchModal.descriptionBulk: Search and apply a new match for all selected items.
matchModal.bulkSearchIntroDesc: Bulk matching starts with a manual tv search. Enter a title above to review shared match options for the selected episodes.
matchModal.detectedMatchesHint: You can use one of the automatically detected matches below, or search for something else!
matchModal.noDetectedMatchesMovieDesc: We could not detect a usable movie match for this item. Search above to find the right title.
matchModal.noDetectedMatchesTvDesc: We could not detect a usable tv match for this item. Search above to find the right show.
matchModal.newDetectedMatchesMovieDesc: This item has not been matched to a movie yet. Search above to find the correct title.
matchModal.newDetectedMatchesTvDesc: This item has not been matched to a show yet. Search above to find the correct tv.
matchModal.errorDetectedMatchesTitle: Automatic matching ran into an issue
matchModal.errorDetectedMatchesMovieDesc: This item could not be matched automatically right now. Search above to choose the correct movie manually.
matchModal.errorDetectedMatchesTvDesc: This item could not be matched automatically right now. Search above to choose the correct show manually.
matchModal.searchResultsHint: Choose a result below to replace the current match.
matchModal.seasonsHint: Choose a season to browse its episodes, or simply match the whole tv.
matchModal.episodesHint: Choose an episode to match it directly, or match the whole season.
matchModal.noResultsTvDesc: We could not find any tv matching your search. Try adjusting the title or year.
matchModal.noResultsMovieDesc: We could not find any movies matching your search. Try adjusting the title or year.
matchModal.noSeasons: No seasons found for this tv.
matchModal.noEpisodes: No episodes found for this season.

tv.title: Match to Tv Only
tv.descNoExisting: Matching to the TV tv level only (without a season or episode number) will set the file's status to 'Uncertain'. You will need to manually edit it later in the 'Review Needed' tab to assign the correct season/episode numbers.
tv.descWithExisting: Matching to the TV tv level only will reset and ignore the detected {existing} info from the file. The file status will become 'Uncertain', and you will need to manually edit it later in the 'Review Needed' tab.

season.title: Match to Season Only
season.descNoExisting: Matching to the Season level only (without an episode number) will set the file's status to 'Uncertain'. You will need to manually edit it later in the 'Review Needed' tab to assign the correct episode number.
season.descWithExisting: Matching to the Season level only will reset and ignore the detected {existing} info from the file. The file status will become 'Uncertain', and you will need to manually edit it later in the 'Review Needed' tab.

bucket.title: Match Multiple Episodes
bucket.desc: This will assign multiple episodes to this single file, which is useful for double-episodes or multi-episode files.
